text: - C. The indemnities provided by the Subcontractor under this paragraph 22 shall be in addition to and not in substitution for any other indemnity required to be provided by the Subcontractor contained in this Agreement and is not limited to but is in addition to the insurance required to be obtained by the Subcontractor under this Agreement. The defense and indemnification obligations under this Subcontract shall not be restricted in any way by any limitation on the amount or type of damages, compensation or benefits payable by or for the Subcontractor under any workers' compensation act, disability benefit act, or other employee benefit act, and shall extend to and include any actions brought by or in the name of any employee of the Subcontractor or of any third party to whom  the  Subcontractor  may  subcontract  a  part  of  all  of  the  Subcontract  Work.  These  indemnity  obligations  shall  survive termination of this Subcontract.
